name: Butterscotch Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan.
2. Stir the brown sugar into the melted butter until it is dissolved.
3. Allow the mixture to cool slightly.
4. Add the egg and vanilla, then beat well.
5. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
6. Mix the sifted ingredients into the butter mixture.
7. Fold in the chopped pecans.
8. Grease and flour an 8x8-inch pan.
9. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
10. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes.
11. Let cool, then dust with confectioners' sugar and cut into bars.
